baseline.observed: CLI and UI rejected zero scan limits, but run_scan itself did not have a zero-limit guard.

observed_weaknesses: Direct Tauri/API callers could still request limit: 0 and get a successful no-op scan.
The backend boundary was less strict than the CLI and UI boundaries.

selected_candidate.name: API scan limit zero rejection
selected_candidate.reason: Align run_scan with CLI/UI positive scan limit semantics.
selected_candidate.success_metric: run_scan returns an error for limit: Some(0), and full local checks still pass.

safety_controls: The change is limited to src-tauri/src/lib.rs.
The new guard runs before source traversal.
A focused unit test covers the API guard.
npm run check was rerun after the change.
